---
title: "Clara's Website"
format: html
---

<div style="text-align: center;">

![](images/headshot.JPG){fig-alt="Profile Picture" style="border-radius: 50%;" width="350"}

<p>
<a href="files/Clara_Bowman_CV.pdf">Download my CV</a>
</p>

</div>

---

## About Me

Hi! I'm Clara, a senior studying Information Analysis with an interest in health data science.  
I enjoy working with data, especially in healthcare contexts, and I’m passionate about using analytics to improve patient outcomes.
